movie.title: They Call Him OG (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Telugu] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: After vanishing from Mumbai’s underworld for a decade, mob boss Ojas Gambheera resurfaces—feared, unstoppable, and with a single goal: to reclaim his empire and exact vengeance on the current tyrant, Omi Bhau. As loyalties fracture and alliances shift, OG reignites a brutal criminal war, confronting both external threats and haunting buried betrayals.
